utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each one is fully specified with relevant details: property (type, location, price, size, layout, fees, availability, move-in date) is complete; financing (method, down payment, rate, term, fees) is complete; legal_services (service name, costs, total) is complete; moving_services (service level, cost, packing included) is complete; setup_services (utility package type, cost, services included) is complete; total_budget (property cost, services cost, grand total, currency) is complete. Therefore, all items are included and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a property described as a 'Modern 1-bedroom condo' in Downtown Toronto with a price of CAD $460,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the closest match in type, size, and price is 'Modern Apartment' (CAD $520K, rating 9), which fits the modern style and urban context. The financing method used was 'Mortgage' with a 20% down payment and a 5.2% interest rate; this aligns with the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (rating 8) rather than 'First-Time Buyer' because the down payment is 20%, not 10%. For legal services, the 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 9) was explicitly named. The moving service chosen was 'Standard' costing CAD $650, which corresponds to 'Standard Moving' (rating 9). The setup services used a 'Premium' utility package costing CAD $280, which matches 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9). Therefore, the chosen items and their ratings are: Modern Apartment (9), Traditional Mortgage (8), Basic Legal Package (9), Standard Moving (9), and Premium Utilities (9).
